title: Unbeeleaveable
description: What do you call a beehive with no exits?
body:
What do you call a beehive with no exits?

***Unbeeleaveable!***

Anyway, this mod adds a beehive with no exits.

It can store infinite bees but never lets them out, because it has no exits.

Craft it from a vanilla bee nest in a stonecutter.

![Stonecutting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MlNiWtb0/images/90b95998006816edf7173655d5486c0cb295a37d.png)

**New feature!** Craft the bee bomb with any bee-containing block and 1 tnt. When lit it will unleash the angry bees inside.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3b8f09918fc06aa0a514b9ce95cf85977d2c5e5.png)
